filters.v2: a guaranteed KO is available but proposal is not an attack (SOFT -- develop-then-attack is legitimate)
filters.v3: play draws past a near-empty deck = deck-out (HARD)
filters.v4: Wally returns energy needed for an available KO (SOFT)
filters.v5: Boss gust when the active is already KO-able (SOFT)
filters.v6: Ignition attach without same-turn Nebula value (SOFT)
filters.v7: retreat with no ready benched Mega to promote (SOFT)

aggregation: hard_veto = any HARD filter fires; soft_flags = advisory SOFT filters
offline_validation: on 500 current-agent actions (Yushin trace): 0 HARD vetoes (filters not over-aggressive); soft flags v2=20 (develop-then-attack), v7=5 (retreat) -- advisory, sensible
caveat: NOT claimed complete; a first gate. Never active in live selection.
